body.notes: Currently inference_gateway fires inline when cloud+local both unavailable, halting the turn. Should be a threshold habit evaluated by ResourceMonitorSource (~30s poll): cloud_ok=False AND local_ok=False → push high-salience TWM observation. Remove inline halt from inference path.
body.title: Move inference-unavailable detection to ResourceMonitorSource (#323 companion)
body.result: ResourceMonitorSource._check_inference_availability() added to push_sources.py — polls cloud (OR key + budget) + local (Ollama is_healthy) every 60s; when both down pushes INFERENCE_UNAVAILABLE at salience/urgency 0.9 with 180s TTL + forensic log; suppresses repeats until condition clears. Tier.6 in inference_gateway.py simplified: removed inline arbiter.submit(), now only logs forensically + returns fallback message. Proactive detection now decoupled from turn path.
